text: What is a material safety data sheet (MSDS)?

options.text: It is used for finding out the dangers of contract
It is used for finding out the effects of inhalation
A document identifying a substance and all its constituents
A document giving the chemical name of the product

explanation: A Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) is an essential document provided by manufacturers that lists the properties, hazards, safe handling procedures, and emergency response information for a specific chemical substance.
